name: video-player-01
title: Video Player 01
author: ilinxa
description: <video> wrapper with muted-autoplay-friendly defaults, slot-based controls via renderControls(state), isActive auto-pause for carousel coordination, double-tap callback, caption tracks, rAF-throttled onTimeUpdate, full lifecycle callbacks, and a public useDoubleTap hook export. Second ship in the social-posts-system arc; first occupant of the media category.
